notes.scope: PubMed full-history retrieval for CAR-DC, CAR-Mac, CAR-Mono, CAR-T, and CAR-NK research articles.
notes.research_article_policy: Keep original research records across clinical, observational, animal, and in vitro studies while excluding clearly non-research publication types where metadata permits.
notes.caveat: PubMed publication type metadata is imperfect. Downstream code should treat the exclusion block as a strong first-pass filter and retain a secondary validation layer.

shared_blocks.exclude_publication_types: NOT (Review[Publication Type] OR Systematic Review[Publication Type] OR Meta-Analysis[Publication Type] OR Editorial[Publication Type] OR Comment[Publication Type] OR Letter[Publication Type] OR News[Publication Type] OR Biography[Publication Type] OR Interview[Publication Type] OR Lecture[Publication Type] OR Guideline[Publication Type] OR Practice Guideline[Publication Type] OR Consensus Development Conference[Publication Type] OR Consensus Development Conference, NIH[Publication Type] OR Historical Article[Publication Type] OR Published Erratum[Publication Type] OR Retraction of Publication[Publication Type] OR Duplicate Publication[Publication Type])
shared_blocks.exclude_title_noise: NOT (review[Title] OR editorial[Title] OR commentary[Title] OR comment[Title] OR perspective[Title] OR perspectives[Title] OR guideline[Title])
shared_blocks.research_filter_strategy: Apply the topic query first, then the publication type exclusion block, then the title-noise exclusion block. Do not exclude clinical trials, observational studies, animal studies, or in vitro studies.

topics.label: CAR-DC
topics.description: CAR-engineered dendritic cells and dendritic-cell-derived CAR platforms.
topics.topic_query: (("CAR-DC"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-DCs"[Title/Abstract] OR (("chimeric antigen receptor"[Title/Abstract] OR "chimeric antigen receptors"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("dendritic cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "dendritic cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "DC"[Title/Abstract] OR "DCs"[Title/Abstract]))) NOT (("CAR-T"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR T"[Title/Abstract] OR "chimeric antigen receptor T"[Title/Abstract]) OR ("CAR-NK"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR NK"[Title/Abstract] OR "chimeric antigen receptor NK"[Title/Abstract]) OR ("CAR-M"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR macrophage"[Title/Abstract]) OR ("CAR-Mono"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR monocyte"[Title/Abstract])))
topics.full_query: ((("CAR-DC"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-DCs"[Title/Abstract] OR (("chimeric antigen receptor"[Title/Abstract] OR "chimeric antigen receptors"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("dendritic cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "dendritic cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "DC"[Title/Abstract] OR "DCs"[Title/Abstract]))) NOT (("CAR-T"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR T"[Title/Abstract] OR "chimeric antigen receptor T"[Title/Abstract]) OR ("CAR-NK"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR NK"[Title/Abstract] OR "chimeric antigen receptor NK"[Title/Abstract]) OR ("CAR-M"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR macrophage"[Title/Abstract]) OR ("CAR-Mono"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR monocyte"[Title/Abstract])))) NOT (Review[Publication Type] OR Systematic Review[Publication Type] OR Meta-Analysis[Publication Type] OR Editorial[Publication Type] OR Comment[Publication Type] OR Letter[Publication Type] OR News[Publication Type] OR Biography[Publication Type] OR Interview[Publication Type] OR Lecture[Publication Type] OR Guideline[Publication Type] OR Practice Guideline[Publication Type] OR Consensus Development Conference[Publication Type] OR Consensus Development Conference, NIH[Publication Type] OR Historical Article[Publication Type] OR Published Erratum[Publication Type] OR Retraction of Publication[Publication Type] OR Duplicate Publication[Publication Type]) NOT (review[Title] OR editorial[Title] OR commentary[Title] OR comment[Title] OR perspective[Title] OR perspectives[Title] OR guideline[Title])

topics.label: CAR-Mac
